top_signals.title: Oil Tanker Attacked by Drone in the Black Sea
top_signals.summary: An oil tanker chartered for loading oil at the Caspian Pipeline Consortium terminal off Russia's Black Sea coast was attacked and damaged by two drones on Friday, CPC said.Sources told Reuters the vessel, the Suezmax-class Nordic Zenith, had…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US agencies miss GENIUS Act deadline for final stablecoin rules
top_signals.summary: US regulators failed to finalize implementing regulations by the GENIUS Act’s one-year deadline, issuing 10 proposed rules instead.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin Japan, which holds no bitcoin, taps EVO Fund in planned $60 million raise to finally buy some
top_signals.summary: A prior December raise instead funded stakes tied to SpaceX and Figure AI, which the company says are its two AI infrastructure investments to date.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: US Proposes Seabed Mining Lease of Blocks Off American Samoa
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Interior Department has proposed a lease of more than 31 million acres off the coast of American Samoa for seabed mining, part of President Donald Trump's broader push to boost U.S. critical minerals production.The waters around the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Armed Assailants Seize Chemical Tanker Off Yemen
top_signals.summary: Armed assailants boarded the chemical tanker Asana off the southern coast of Yemen in the Gulf of Aden on Friday and are in control of the vessel, maritime security officials said.Based on initial assessments, the incident appeared to be related…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
